about.bio: I started coding at 12 by building mini-games on platforms such as Game Creator and Roblox. What began as curiosity evolved into a deeper interest in software engineering, system design, and creative digital experiences. Beyond technology, I am passionate about the financial sector — including stock trading and investment — and I enjoy exploring how technology can optimize financial decision-making. I also love traveling and going to the gym, and I aspire to become a software engineer who designs impactful and innovative digital solutions.

projects.title: Automated Projected Appointment
projects.description: An automated system for projecting and managing appointments, streamlining scheduling workflows.

projects.title: Automated CV Display System
projects.description: A dynamic CV display system that automatically formats and presents resume content.

projects.title: Data Sorting Application
projects.description: An application for sorting and organizing large datasets efficiently.

projects.title: Fruit Image Classifier
projects.description: A machine learning model trained to classify fruit images using convolutional neural networks.

projects.title: Library Inventory System
projects.description: A full-stack inventory management system for tracking library books and resources.

projects.title: Medicine Dispenser Project
projects.description: An IoT-enabled medicine dispenser that automates medication scheduling and dispensing.

projects.title: Virtual Marketplace
projects.description: A peer-to-peer virtual marketplace platform for buying and selling goods online.

projects.title: Mental Health Support Mobile App
projects.description: A mobile application providing mental health resources, mood tracking, and peer support features.

clubs.name: SP Canoe Polo
clubs.description: I spent two years in the SP Canoe Polo Executive Committee balancing high-level leadership with the physical grind of the sport. As President and Vice President, I helped the club achieve an Excellence Award in 2022 by setting ambitious SMART goals and overhauling recruitment. On the water, I competed in multiple university-level tournaments, secured two medals, and earned the honor of representing Singapore on the Under-21 National Team.

clubs.name: HQ RSAF NSF Council
clubs.description: I serve as a leader in the HQ RSAF NSF Council, making the NS journey more engaging and meaningful for my fellow airmen. My role involves mentoring the EXCO team, working closely with senior RSAF leadership to represent NSF perspectives, and coordinating large-scale learning visits to the Singapore Navy Museum, Indian Heritage Centre, and Singapore City Gallery.

clubs.name: EEE Club
clubs.description: My leadership journey started early within the SP Electrical & Electronic Engineering Club's Welfare Committee. During COVID-19, I focused on maintaining student morale by coordinating exam welfare pack distribution. I also served as a Group Leader for student camps, finding creative ways to mentor new students and ensure they felt welcomed into the SP community.

achievements.title: Best Airman of the Month
achievements.description: Awarded Best Airman of the Month at HQ RSAF for outstanding performance and leadership.

achievements.title: ST Engineering Prize
achievements.description: Awarded the ST Engineering Prize for academic excellence in Engineering.
